summary: Fixed writeFileSync in runExecuteRunCommands to be wrapped in its own try/catch so a disk error cannot swallow a required-command failure. Updated the verdictAppend JSDoc to correctly scope its effect to cmdSynthesize only. Replaced inline artifact tests with direct runExecuteRunCommands calls (deleting production artifact code now breaks tests) and added a cwd assertion test that verifies commands execute in the provided working directory.
